title: AST Warrant Arrest: Big Lake [AK25002450]
summary: On 6/3/25 AST conducted a traffic stop on a vehicle for an equipment violation on W Maplewood Drive in Big Lake. The driver, Raymond Pointer (55), was found to have an active warrant for Driving with License Suspended. Raymond was remanded to Mat-Su Pretrial and held on $500 bail.
sourceAttribution: Source: Alaska State Troopers Daily Dispatch

title: 2025 Yukon River Chinook Run Timing Forecast
summary: The Yukon River Chinook Run Timing Project is a collaboration between the Alaska Department of Fish & Game , the National Oceanic and Atmospheric Administration , and the Alaska Ocean Observing System . Yukon River Chinook are predicted to arrive on the delta with average run timing in 2025: The first significant pulse (15% point) is expected by June 13th and 50% of the run is expected to have arrived by June 21st. April mean air temperature at the Nome, AK airport (AMATC) was -5.0°C, s...

title: Q&A: Tribal Administrator Esther Aaltséen Reese will soon leave Wrangell Cooperative Association; she reflects on her work before moving on with Tlingit and Haida
summary: Esther Aaltséen Reese gets ready for a Krizz Kaliko event that the Wrangell Cooperative Association put on at the high school on May 20, 2025. (Colette Czarnecki/KSTK) Esther Aaltséen Reese has been with the Wrangell Cooperative Association for the past 13 years. But now that’s about to change. Reese is leaving her role as tribal administrator. She’ll be moving to Juneau to serve as the Chief Operating Officer for the Tlingit and Haida Regional Housing Authority. She said she will end her current position and start her new one in mid-June. KSTK’s Colette Czarnecki talked...

title: AST Fugitive From Justice: Fairbanks [AK25053105]
summary: On June 3, 2025 Grants Pass Police Department in Oregon contacted the Alaska State Troopers to request assistance in apprehending 19 yo Timothy Evans, whom they discovered was living in the Fairbanks area. Evans had a nationwide $250,000 fully extraditable arrest warrant for Assault II and Unlawful use of a Weapon out of Oregon. On June 4, 2025, the Alaska State Troopers Criminal Suppression Unit (CSU) in Fairbanks located Timothy Evans and took him into custody. Evans was remanded to the Fairbanks Correctional Center on charges of Fugitive from Justice. Evans will be held without bail while he awaits extradition to Oregon.
sourceAttribution: Source: Alaska State Troopers Daily Dispatch

entities.address_detail: contacted the Alaska State Troopers to request assistance in apprehending 19 yo Timothy Evans

title: AST Wildlife Violation: Soldotna [AK25053594]
summary: On 6/4/2025 at approximately 1010 hours, Alaska Wildlife Troopers contacted Dennis Taylor, age 22 of Soldotna, while sealing a black bear at Soldotna ADFG. Taylor did not have the required permit to take a black bear in GMU 6D and was issued a citation with $150 fine.
sourceAttribution: Source: Alaska State Troopers Daily Dispatch

title: AST Animal Cruelty Investigation: Wasilla [AK25051318]
summary: On 06/04/2025 AST, in collaboration with Matsu Animal Care, conducted a search warrant on a residence on E Susitna Dr, in Wasilla, due to Animal Welfare concerns. 21 dogs were recovered living inside the residence. MatSu Borough Animal Care has taken protective custody of the Animals pending examination by a veterinarian and AST investigation of potential animal cruelty charges.
sourceAttribution: Source: Alaska State Troopers Daily Dispatch

title: AST Assault DV: Fairbanks [AK25053496]
summary: On 06/04/2025 at approximately 0053 hours, The Alaska State Trooper responded to a disturbance in Fairbanks. Troopers' investigation determined that Leisa Jones committed the crimes of Assault 2 dv and Assault in the presence of a child. Leisa was transported to FCC.
